name: Chicken Marinade #2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large screw-top jar, combine wine, oil, soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, mustard and pepper to taste.
2. Cover and shake until blended.
3. Arrange chicken in a large plastic bag set in a shallow pan.
4. Pour marinade over chicken, forcing as much marinade up and around the chicken as possible.
5. Tie bag tightly closed.
6. Refrigerate chicken 4 to 6 hours, turning the bag over once.
7. Grill or broil chicken, turning often, until juices run clear.
